sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59909" key="krhseri/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρησερ-ίτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ] ἄρτος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, bread <sense id="n59909.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of sifted flour</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
